CREATE TABLE time_test (first_date DateTime, second_date DateTime);
CREATE TABLE time_test2 (id Int32, start_time DateTime, end_time DateTime);
INSERT INTO time_test2 VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-01-01 10:00:00'), toDateTime('2023-01-01 10:05:00'));
INSERT INTO time_test2 VALUES (2, toDateTime('2023-01-01 11:00:00'), toDateTime('2023-01-01 11:10:00'));
SELECT id, timeDiff(start_time, end_time) FROM time_test2;
SELECT AVG(timeDiff(start_time, end_time)) as average_diff FROM time_test2;
SELECT id FROM time_test2 WHERE timeDiff(start_time, end_time) > 300;
SELECT timeDiff(first_date, (SELECT MIN(second_date) FROM time_test)) FROM time_test;
SELECT COUNT(*) as records_with_diff_zero FROM time_test WHERE timeDiff(first_date, second_date) = 0;
